offence: General penalty for offences with no specific penalty
punishment: Fine of Rs. 500 for the first offence and Rs. 1,500 for any subsequent offence.

offence: Disobeying a lawful direction of or obstructing an authority
Driving without a valid driving licence
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months and/or fine of Rs. 5,000.
Fine of Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 2,000 for light vehicles and higher for medium/heavy vehicles; licence may be impounded on repeat.

offence: Dangerous driving (including using a phone while driving)
punishment: First offence: imprisonment up to 1 year and/or fine of Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000; subsequent: up to 2 years and/or Rs. 10,000.

offence: Driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs
punishment: First offence: imprisonment up to 6 months and/or fine up to Rs. 10,000; subsequent: imprisonment up to 2 years and/or fine up to Rs. 15,000.

offence: Using a motor vehicle without registration
punishment: Fine of Rs. 2,000 to Rs. 5,000 for the first offence; imprisonment and higher fine on repeat.

offence: Using a motor vehicle without a valid permit
punishment: Fine up to Rs. 10,000 and/or imprisonment up to 6 months.
Fine of Rs. 20,000 plus Rs. 2,000 for every extra tonne of overload.

offence: Not wearing a seat belt (or carrying unbelted children)
Carrying more than the permitted number of persons on a two-wheeler
punishment: Fine of Rs. 2,000 and disqualification of the licence for 3 months.

offence: Riding a two-wheeler without a protective helmet
punishment: Fine of Rs. 1,000 and disqualification of the licence for 3 months.
First offence: imprisonment up to 3 months and/or fine of Rs. 2,000; subsequent: imprisonment up to 3 months and/or fine of Rs. 4,000.

offence: Offence committed by a juvenile (minor) driver
punishment: The guardian or vehicle owner is deemed guilty: fine of Rs. 25,000 with imprisonment up to 3 years; the vehicle's registration is cancelled and the juvenile is barred from a licence until age 25.
